prestazioni: Engine: B202L (2.0L 16V turbocharged inline-4) – Full forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Saab Performance Parts (SPP). Upgraded head studs from ARP and a ported/polished cylinder head with oversized Ferrea valves (intake: 36mm, exhaust: 31mm) and upgraded valve springs from Supertech.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT2860RS-5 (GT28R) with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing and 57 trim compressor wheel, paired with a TiAL 44mm external wastegate (V-Band) and a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe with a 3" catless exhaust system featuring a Burns Stainless muffler for optimized spool and flow.

Fuel & Ignition: Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a custom ECU tune via Trionic 8 (T8) standalone with a Haltech CAN expansion module for boost-by-gear and launch control. Ignition system upgraded to MSD 8207 coils and NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (heat range 7) for consistent combustion under high boost (22 psi peak).
estetica: Body Kit: Custom Saab 900 SPG-specific Rocket Bunny widebody conversion (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with carbon fiber overfenders and a custom front splitter from APR Performance (Saab 900-specific mounting points). Rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon with integrated exhaust cutouts for the Burns Stainless system.

Wheels & Suspension: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (17x9 +25 front, 17x10 +30 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear). Full Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (SAAB 900-specific valving) with adjustable camber plates and polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (black series) for improved chassis rigidity.

Interior & Aero: Full carbon fiber dashboard overlay from Saab Design (custom-fit for SPG), Recaro SRD-E seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (MIG-welded, T45 steel, bolt-in design). Rear wing: APR Performance GTC-300 (Saab 900-specific trunk mounts) with adjustable angle for downforce tuning.
